original_image_tags: The document is a black-and-white image of a typed report on dark paper. The text is printed in white. The paper shows significant visual noise or texture, appearing like a negative or a scan of a very dark original. There are three binder holes on the left margin. The classification marking "RESTRICTED" appears both at the top and bottom of the page. A handwritten number "201" is visible in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: A faded 'RESTRICTED' stamp is visible at the top and bottom of the page, with the text appearing somewhat blurred or worn.
